hero.title: Your Safety Is Our Mission
hero.subtitle: Professional security services trusted by businesses and individuals across Metro Manila for over 40 years.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Core Services
services.businessDesc: Vigilant protection for your facilities, staff, and assets.
services.assetDesc: Securing vacant properties and company inventories.
services.corporateDesc: Round-the-clock security for offices and private estates.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: 40+ Years of Trusted Security
about.body: Liberty Investigation & Security Agency Inc. has been protecting Metro Manila since 1983. With over 5,000 active guards and SOSIA accreditation, we deliver professional security solutions tailored to every client.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Security
contact.subtitle: Reach out and we'll respond within one business day.
contact.name: Your Name

hero.label: About Us
hero.title: Decades of Dedicated Protection
hero.subtitle: Since 1983, LISAI has stood as one of Metro Manila's most trusted security agencies.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Built on Trust, Driven by Service
story.body: Liberty Investigation & Security Agency Inc. was founded with a simple belief — that every person and business deserves to feel safe. Over four decades, we've grown from a small team to over 5,000 deployed guards across the region.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: Yes. All our guards undergo SOSIA-accredited training through Palacio Security Training Academy Inc.
faq.a2: We operate primarily across Metro Manila and nearby provinces.
faq.q3: How quickly can guards be deployed?
faq.a3: We can deploy within 24–72 hours depending on the scale of your requirement.
faq.q4: Do you offer female security guards?
faq.a4: Yes, we have trained female security officers available for appropriate assignments.

hero.label: Our Services
hero.title: Security Solutions For Every Threat
hero.subtitle: From guarding your business premises to protecting high-profile individuals — we offer a full range of professional security services tailored to your needs.

our.label: Our Services
our.title: Our Security Services
our.subtitle: Every service is designed with one goal in mind — your safety. We match the right team and approach to your specific situation.
our.businessDesc: Ensuring the safety of facilities and staff through vigilant property patrols, diligent surveillance equipment monitoring, and thorough inspections of buildings and equipment.
our.assetDesc: Highly proficient in protecting company assets — including inventories and stocks — and ensuring the security of vacant properties and buildings by preventing unauthorized entry and squatting.
our.personalDesc: Prominent individuals and corporate entities face various threats, from stalkers to protests. Our personal security packages prioritize your well-being, granting you the freedom to pursue your goals confidently.
our.corporateDesc: Round-the-clock security for corporate offices, residences, and private estates. We use advanced technology and highly trained personnel to ensure the safety and security of your assets and premises.

how.label: Our Process
how.title: How We Get You Protected
how.subtitle: A straightforward process from first contact to full deployment — no guesswork, no delays.
how.step1Desc: We discuss your specific security needs, concerns, and requirements — no hassle.
how.step2Desc: Our team conducts a thorough evaluation of your location to identify vulnerabilities.
how.step3Desc: We design a tailored plan and assign the right personnel and equipment for your needs.
how.step4Desc: Guards are deployed and operations are continuously monitored for your peace of mind.

industries.label: Who We Serve
industries.title: Industries We Protect
industries.subtitle: Our guards and security personnel are experienced across a wide range of environments and industries, ensuring specialized protection for every sector.

different.label: Why Choose LISAI
different.title: What Makes Our Service Different
different.subtitle: We don't just post a guard and walk away. Every engagement is backed by structured training, proper supervision, and a commitment to your long-term safety.

talk.label: Ready to Get Started?
talk.title: Talk to Our Security Team Today
talk.subtitle: Reach out directly and we'll match you with the right service — no obligation, no runaround. Just a straightforward conversation about protecting what matters to you.

hero.label: Jobs / Training
hero.subtitle: Are you interested in a rewarding career as a security guard? Join our exceptional team and take the first step towards a fulfilling profession.

positions.label: Open Positions
positions.title: We're Hiring
positions.subtitle: We proudly offer comprehensive training programs to equip individuals who aspire to excel in the security industry. No prior experience required for some roles.
positions.roleDesc: Responsible for protecting client premises, conducting patrols, monitoring surveillance equipment, and maintaining order at assigned posts.

training.label: Our Training Partner
training.title: Comprehensive Security Training
training.body: We offer comprehensive security education and training to our team members in collaboration with our sister company, Palacio Security Training Academy Inc. Our programs encompass diverse topics — from job responsibilities and theft prevention to crisis response and risk management.
training.c2: Prevention of Theft from Commercial Premises
training.scheduleVal: Batches run regularly — Inquire for next available date
training.locationVal: Suite 302 Blessingking Bldg, Grace Park, Caloocan

requirements.title: Basic Requirements
requirements.r1: Filipino citizen, male or female, 21–45 years old
requirements.r2: At least high school graduate (Senior High preferred)
requirements.r3: Physically and mentally fit; no criminal record
requirements.r5: Must be able to work in shifting schedules
requirements.r6: Valid NBI Clearance and Barangay Clearance
requirements.b1Desc: Salary aligned with DOLE standards and industry rates
requirements.b2Desc: SOSIA-accredited courses through Palacio Training Academy
requirements.b4Desc: 40+ years of company stability with 5,000+ active guards
requirements.b5Desc: Clear path from guard to supervisor and senior roles
requirements.b6Desc: Assignments across Metro Manila in diverse industries

join.title: Join the LISAI Family
join.subtitle: Be part of a team that has protected lives and assets across Metro Manila for over four decades.

intro.label: Application Process
intro.e1: Fill out a short application form — takes about 3 minutes.
intro.e2: Attach your resume or any relevant documents.
intro.e3: Our HR team will review and reach out within 3–5 business days.
intro.e4: Selected applicants will be invited for an interview.

form.label: Job Application
form.subtitle: Fill out all fields below. Our HR team will be in touch within 3–5 business days.
form.consent: By submitting, you agree to have your information reviewed by the LISAI HR team.
form.successBody: Thanks, {{name}}. We've received your application for {{position}}. Our HR team will be in touch within 3–5 business days.
form.errPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid PH number (e.g. 09XX XXX XXXX or +639XX XXX XXXX).
form.errResume: Please upload your resume or CV.
form.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
form.errNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
form.fileSizeErr: File exceeds 5MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.
